title: Diamond Disassembler
description: Allows players to disassemble diamond gear in furnaces similar to iron/gold. Config file to easily change plugin functions.
body:
**Diamond Disassembler** is a customizable plugin that allows players to disassemble diamond gear in furnaces, similar to how iron and gold gear can be smelted back into nuggets. This plugin is perfect for servers that want to add a recycling mechanic for diamond equipment.

![Recipes show up after smelting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31566605de8a21fa54805a32da9bd6083556afc4.png)
![enchanted items can be smelted as well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28652255ff2794885e1fa4069ee24aac0d320add.png)

# **Features**
Disassemble Diamond Gear: Players can smelt diamond gear in furnaces to retrieve diamonds.
Configurable Rewards: Server administrators can customize the number of diamonds received from each piece of gear.
Experience Customization: Set the amount of experience points players earn for smelting diamond gear.
Adjustable Cooking Time: Configure the time it takes to smelt each piece of diamond gear.
​
# **Commands**
1. /ddis reload - Reloads config.yml file without needing a restart​
 
# **Configuration**
All parameters can be customized in the config.yml file, allowing for flexibility in how the plugin operates. Adjust the diamonds, experience, and cooking time for each piece of diamond gear to suit your server's needs.
![Experience should be 1 or higher to receive when removing diamonds from furnaces.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceb87d48b4b90c489bada3c24571c01b94b2d873.png)
